name: 10 Days in Japan
description: A curated 10-day Japan itinerary — Tokyo to Miyajima — with the route on a live map, a photo and food/transit/tips per stop, and an ask-the-guide AI.
features: A complete curated 10-day itinerary authored at build time: 7 real stops in order (Tokyo, Hakone, Kyoto, Nara, Osaka, Hiroshima, Miyajima) with coordinates, descriptions, highlights, food, transit, and tips
A hero image and a trip-at-a-glance summary
The route on the seeded MapLibre map: day-coloured numbered markers + a route line across Japan
A baked photo per stop (real scenes) with an emoji/gradient fallback
An ask-the-guide box: sdk.ai.chat grounded in the itinerary answers trip questions
Bookmark favourite stops to per-user storage; polish with plain CSS only

uses: answer questions about this specific baked Japan itinerary

ui.layout: hero + trip-at-a-glance, route map, one rich card per stop, an ask-the-guide box

acceptance: On open with no input the full 10-day itinerary, map, and all 7 stop cards are already present
The map shows all 7 stops as numbered markers joined by a route line across Japan, auto-fit
Each stop card has a photo (with emoji fallback), description, highlights, food picks, transit, and a tip
Ask-the-guide calls sdk.ai.chat with the itinerary as context, shows a loading state, and degrades gracefully
Bookmarks persist to storage; polish uses plain CSS only with no added dependency
